projects.name: Demo Hyperf API
projects.command: if php bin/hyperf.php list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "server:watch"; then php bin/hyperf.php server:watch; else php bin/hyperf.php start; fi
projects.notes: Hyperf uses one dedicated container per project. Host port 9502 maps to container port 9501 by default.

projects.name: Demo Laravel App
projects.notes: Projects path is the project root. The Nginx site root should point to /develop/demo-laravel/public.
